scope: Provider verified-flag flips after operator-rehearsed Challenge Tests passing on the Phase-3 matrix infrastructure

verified_providers_after_phase_4.challenge: C1 (App Launch + Trackers menu visible) + C2 (RuTracker authenticated Sign in)
C11 (ArchiveOrg anonymous Continue → authorized main app)
verified_providers_after_phase_4.first_verified: Phase 4.1a (2026-05-04 late) — flipped from verified=false to verified=true
verified_providers_after_phase_4.falsifiability: Revert layer-1 IA fix (drop AuthType.NONE short-circuit in ProviderLoginViewModel.onSubmitClick) → C11 times out at the post-Continue waitUntil for 'Search history' (the spinner stays + auth state never authorizes). Mutation reverted; baseline restored.
verified_providers_after_phase_4.deep_coverage_owed: Search archive.org for 'ubuntu' → assert result row with 'downloads'/'seeders' text. Owed pending nav-compose 2.9.0 lifecycle bug fix (library upgrade).

verified_providers_after_phase_4.challenge: C12 (Gutenberg anonymous Continue → authorized main app)
verified_providers_after_phase_4.first_verified: Phase 4.1b (2026-05-04 late) — flipped from verified=false to verified=true
verified_providers_after_phase_4.falsifiability: Same protocol as C11 — both providers route through the same AuthType.NONE short-circuit + layer-3 signalAuthorized bridge. The matched-pair pattern means a regression in either layer breaks both tests simultaneously, providing redundant detection.
verified_providers_after_phase_4.deep_coverage_owed: Search gutendex.com for 'shakespeare' → assert book row. Owed pending nav-compose upgrade.

still_unverified.blocker: kinozal.tv may be geofenced from the test environment (CIS-only); real-network rehearsal needs a route to the upstream. KINOZAL_USERNAME/PASSWORD ARE present in .env, so the credential-handling part is ready. Phase 4.1c (geo-availability check) deferred.
still_unverified.remediation_owed: Operator confirms kinozal.tv reachability from the test environment OR the matrix runs from a CIS-region VPS. Then C9 runs same shape as C2 (real-network FORM_LOGIN).

still_unverified.blocker: .env lacks NNMCLUB_USERNAME / NNMCLUB_PASSWORD. C10 cannot run end-to-end without them; assumeTrue skips. The matrix attestation gate refuses to mark NnmclubDescriptor.verified=true until the test passes.
still_unverified.remediation_owed: Operator obtains NNMCLUB account credentials, adds to .env (gitignored). Then C10 runs same shape as C9.

summary: Phase 4 closed for 2 of 4 hidden providers (archiveorg + gutenberg). The remaining 2 (kinozal + nnmclub) have clean operator-required blockers (geo-routing + credentials respectively). The user-facing provider list now contains 4 verified providers: RuTracker.org, RuTor.info, Internet Archive, Project Gutenberg.
next_phase: Phase 5 (submodule mirror symmetry) is operator-action gated. Phase 6 (release tag) requires the FULL multi-AVD matrix per clause 6.I clause 2 — running this same evidence on CZ_API28 + CZ_API30 + CZ_API34 + Pixel_9a, each form factor, before scripts/tag.sh will accept the next release tag.
